name: Rice-Soy Bread (Gluten Free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the soy flour, defatted brown rice flour, and baking powder in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the honey and water until well mixed.
3. Pour the honey mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Grease or oil a round or square baking pan lightly.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes, or until browned.
7. To check for doneness, insert a toothpick into the center of the loaf.
8. When the toothpick comes out clean, the bread is done.
This is a dense, heavy loaf.
